hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在；【WORLD】国际网络攻击扰乱了大片大学和学校；【WORLD】阿联酋航空在伊朗战争期间加强美国和以色列的关系。

items.title: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
items.summary: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在
items.summary_zh: Anthropic Mythos 的到来让银行、软件巨头和政府开始思考网络攻击的新时代。但威胁已经来临。

items.title: International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools
items.summary: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.
items.title_zh: 国际网络攻击扰乱了大片大学和学校
items.summary_zh: 一个黑客组织入侵了全球数千所学校和大学使用的学术软件 Canvas。

items.title: Emirates Doubles Down on U.S. and Israeli Ties Amid Iran War
items.summary: The United Arab Emirates has borne the brunt of Iranian attacks throughout the war, hardening the government’s resolve to reassess its list of friends and foes.
items.title_zh: 阿联酋航空在伊朗战争期间加强美国和以色列的关系
items.summary_zh: 整个战争期间，阿拉伯联合酋长国首当其冲地遭受了伊朗的袭击，这坚定了政府重新评估其朋友和敌人名单的决心。

items.title: U.S. added 115K jobs in April, nearly doubling expectations
items.summary: The data comes ahead of what's expected to be a new Federal Reserve chairman taking the reins at the U.S. central bank later this month.
items.title_zh: 美国 4 月份新增就业岗位 11.5 万，几乎是预期的两倍
items.summary_zh: 该数据公布之前，预计新任美联储主席将于本月晚些时候就任美联储主席。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Fires on Iranian Tankers as Tehran Accuses Washington of ‘Reckless’ Attacks
items.summary: Iran’s foreign minister accused Washington of undermining diplomacy. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the U.S. expected to hear from Tehran on Friday.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：德黑兰指责华盛顿“鲁莽”袭击，美国向伊朗油轮开火
items.summary_zh: 伊朗外长指责华盛顿破坏外交。美国国务卿马可·卢比奥表示，美国预计将于周五收到德黑兰的消息。

items.title: Bitcoin retreats below $80,000, liquidating $300 million in futures bets
items.summary: BTC fell under $80,000 after U.S. strikes in Iran sent oil briefly above $100, triggering liquidations and a shift toward bearish positioning.
items.title_zh: 比特币跌破 80,000 美元，清算 3 亿美元的期货押注
items.summary_zh: 美国对伊朗的袭击导致油价短暂突破 100 美元，引发清算并转向看跌头寸，导致 BTC 跌破 80,000 美元。

items.title: Bitcoin rally cools as April jobs fails to break macro ceiling with Iran tensions and ETF outflows in play
items.summary: Bitcoin holds near $80,200 after April nonfarm payrolls beat expectations as Iran tensions and ETF outflows check the rally.
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗紧张局势和 ETF 资金外流，4 月份就业未能突破宏观上限，比特币涨势降温
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗紧张局势和 ETF 资金外流抑制了反弹，4 月份非农就业数据超出预期，比特币维持在 80,200 美元附近。

items.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 使用 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展网络的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展了网络可信访问，帮助经过验证的防御者加速漏洞研究并保护关键基础设施。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
items.summary: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与习近平峰会的焦点可能会推迟关税和稀土方面的进展
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗战争，稀土和供应链等美国企业面临的重大问题可能在特习峰会议程上退居二线。

items.title: Kalshi traders see odds rising that a U.S.-Iran nuclear deal will be reached by 2027
items.summary: It comes after Axios reported on Wednesday that the two countries were nearing a one-page memo to end their war.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，美国与伊朗 2027 年达成核协议的可能性上升
items.summary_zh: 此前，Axios 周三报道称，两国即将签署一页备忘录来结束战争。

items.title: Ryan Cohen's mysterious bank letter backing GameStop's eBay bid reveals a big issue with deal
items.summary: The combined company would need to maintain an investment-grade credit profile, GameStop's mysterious financing letter said.
items.title_zh: 瑞安·科恩（Ryan Cohen）神秘的银行信件支持 GameStop 收购 eBay，揭示了交易中的一个大问题
items.summary_zh: GameStop 神秘的融资信称，合并后的公司需要保持投资级信用状况。

items.title: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 12%
items.summary: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
items.title_zh: 惠而浦表示，伊朗战争导致“经济衰退级别的工业衰退”。股价下跌12%
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示：“随着消费者信心在二月底和三月崩溃，伊朗战争导致美国工业出现衰退水平。”

items.title: Asian Development Bank's $70 billion energy and digital infra push puts Southeast Asia center stage
items.summary: Southeast Asia to benefit significantly from Asian Development Bank's $70 billion new energy and digital infrastructure plan in Asia and the Pacific by 2035.
items.title_zh: 亚洲开发银行斥资 700 亿美元推动能源和数字基础设施建设，使东南亚成为焦点
items.summary_zh: 到 2035 年，东南亚将从亚洲开发银行在亚太地区 700 亿美元的新能源和数字基础设施计划中受益匪浅。

items.title: Goodbye quarterly earnings? Here's when traders believe this big change will happen
items.summary: Traders are evenly divided as to whether the change will happen by Jan. 1. That would be an unusually fast timeline for the commission.
items.title_zh: 告别季度收益？这是交易者相信这一重大变化将会发生的时候
items.summary_zh: 对于是否会在 1 月 1 日之前发生这一变化，交易员们意见不一。对于委员会来说，这将是一个异常快的时间表。

items.title: Apollo CEO Rowan warns of market correction, slams 'egregious' practices at rival insurers
items.summary: Apollo CEO Marc Rowan warned that markets face an elevated risk of unexpected shocks, saying he is positioning the firm defensively for an expected correction.
items.title_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官罗文警告市场调整，抨击竞争对手保险公司的“恶劣”做法
items.summary_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官马克·罗文（Marc Rowan）警告说，市场面临意外冲击的风险较高，并表示他正在为公司做好防御性调整，以应对预期的调整。

items.title: Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of breaching Victory Day ceasefire
items.summary: The two sides report responding to hundreds of drone attacks, just hours into a truce to cover celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯和乌克兰互相指责对方违反胜利日停火协议
items.summary_zh: 双方报告称，对数百起无人机袭击做出了回应，而休战仅几个小时后，两国就庆祝苏联战胜纳粹德国进行了报道。

items.title: White House calls Mark Hamill 'sick' after actor's Trump grave post
items.summary: The Star Wars actor apologised and deleted the post, which contained an AI image of the president in a shallow grave.
items.title_zh: 演员马克·哈米尔在特朗普墓碑上发表言论后，白宫称他“有病”
items.summary_zh: 这位星球大战演员道歉并删除了该帖子，其中包含总统在浅坟墓中的人工智能图像。

items.title: Three dead after volcano erupts on Indonesian island
items.summary: Officials had previously issued warnings on climbing the active volcano due to safety concerns.
items.title_zh: 印度尼西亚岛屿火山喷发 造成三人死亡
items.summary_zh: 出于安全考虑，官员此前曾对攀登活火山发出警告。

items.title: Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz strait
items.summary: US President Donald Trump says the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran is still in place.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡交火后油价上涨
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，华盛顿和德黑兰之间的停火仍然有效。

items.title: U.A.E. Expels Pakistani Workers, as Pakistan’s Peacemaking Creates a Rift
items.summary: As Pakistan mediates between the U.S. and Iran, its ties to the Emirates have deteriorated. Pakistani workers say they are now being sent home en masse.
items.title_zh: 阿联酋驱逐巴基斯坦工人，巴基斯坦的和平建设造成裂痕
items.summary_zh: 随着巴基斯坦在美国和伊朗之间进行调解，其与阿联酋的关系已经恶化。巴基斯坦工人表示，他们现在正被集体遣送回家。

items.title: China Sees a ‘Giant With a Limp’ as U.S. Drains Weapons on Iran War
items.summary: America’s ability to deter China in a war over Taiwan is weakened, Chinese analysts say, giving Beijing leverage in an upcoming summit with President Trump.
items.title_zh: 美国在伊朗战争中消耗武器，中国看到了一个“跛行的巨人”
items.summary_zh: 中国分析人士称，美国在台湾战争中威慑中国的能力被削弱，这让北京在即将与特朗普总统举行的峰会上获得了筹码。

items.title: XRP pushes toward $1.40 as tightening range lowers breakout chances
items.summary: Price moved higher on a late volume burst, with traders watching whether compression near $1.39-$1.40 finally resolves into a larger move.
items.title_zh: XRP 逼近 1.40 美元，因为区间收紧降低了突破机会
items.summary_zh: 价格因后期成交量爆发而走高，交易者关注 1.39-1.40 美元附近的压缩是否最终会转化为更大的波动。

items.title: Stablecoins have their 'permission slip.' Now comes the hard part.
items.summary: Executives from MoonPay, Ripple and Paxos said at Consensus Miami 2026 that regulation has accelerated stablecoin adoption, but infrastructure, privacy and distribution remain major hurdles.
items.title_zh: 稳定币有其“许可单”。现在是最困难的部分。
items.summary_zh: MoonPay、Ripple 和 Paxos 的高管在 2026 年迈阿密共识大会上表示，监管加速了稳定币的采用，但基础设施、隐私和分发仍然是主要障碍。

items.title: Coinbase bulls point to crypto legislation and stablecoins after earnings miss
items.summary: Analysts say Coinbase’s long-term growth may depend more on stablecoins and U.S. crypto legislation than a rebound in trading activity.
items.title_zh: 收益低于预期后，Coinbase 多头将目光转向加密立法和稳定币
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，Coinbase 的长期增长可能更多地依赖于稳定币和美国加密立法，而不是交易活动的反弹。

items.title: Bernstein says Coinbase’s ‘everything exchange’ strategy is gaining traction despite weak first-quarter results, sees 71% upside
items.summary: The analysts maintained an outperform rating and $330 price target on Coinbase despite weaker first-quarter results.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 表示，尽管第一季度业绩疲软，Coinbase 的“一切交易”策略仍在获得关注，预计上涨 71%
items.summary_zh: 尽管第一季度业绩疲软，分析师仍维持 Coinbase 跑赢大盘的评级和 330 美元的目标价。

items.title: Senator Warren presses Meta over stablecoin trial ahead of 2026 rollout plans
items.summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren questioned Meta over its stablecoin trial, citing Libra risks and 2026 integration plans.
items.title_zh: Warren 参议员就 2026 年推出计划之前的稳定币试验向 Meta 施压
items.summary_zh: 参议员 Elizabeth Warren 以 Libra 风险和 2026 年整合计划为由，对 Meta 的稳定币试验提出质疑。

items.title: ECB’s Lagarde flags euro-denominated stablecoins as financial stability risk, diverging from Bundesbank stance
items.summary: The ECB President argued that euro-denominated stablecoins risk financial stability and monetary policy, pushing for a digital euro instead.
items.title_zh: 欧洲央行拉加德将欧元计价的稳定币标记为金融稳定风险，这与德国央行的立场不同
items.summary_zh: 欧洲央行行长认为，以欧元计价的稳定币会危及金融稳定和货币政策，因此转而推动数字欧元。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Ondo (ONDO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #45.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Ondo (ONDO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 45 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #692.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：wojak (WOJAK)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#692。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #245.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：MegaETH (MEGA)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 245 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #264.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Pharos（PROS）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 264 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #185.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Billions Network (BILL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 185。

items.title: Simplex rethinks software development with Codex
items.summary: Simplex boosts software development with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex, reducing design, build, and testing time while scaling AI-driven workflows.
items.title_zh: Simplex 使用 Codex 重新思考软件开发
items.summary_zh: Simplex 通过 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 促进软件开发，减少设计、构建和测试时间，同时扩展人工智能驱动的工作流程。

items.title: Singular Bank helps bankers move fast with ChatGPT and Codex
items.summary: Singular Bank built Singularity, an internal assistant using ChatGPT and Codex to help bankers save 60–90 minutes daily on meeting prep, portfolio analysis, and follow-up.
items.title_zh: Singular Bank 通过 ChatGPT 和 Codex 帮助银行家快速行动
items.summary_zh: Singular Bank 使用 ChatGPT 和 Codex 构建了 Singularity，这是一款内部助手，可帮助银行家每天在会议准备、投资组合分析和跟进方面节省 60-90 分钟的时间。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享了 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Live Updates: U.K. Local Election Results Point to Big Losses for Starmer’s Party
items.summary: With votes still being tallied, Prime Minister Keir Starmer took responsibility for Labour losing hundreds of municipal seats but insisted he would not resign.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：英国地方选举结果表明斯塔默党将遭受重大损失
items.summary_zh: 由于计票仍在进行中，总理基尔·斯塔默承认工党失去数百个市政席位的责任，但坚称他不会辞职。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) gains 6.3%, leading index higher
items.summary: Internet Computer (ICP), up 5.8% from Thursday, was also a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：NEAR Protocol (NEAR) 上涨 6.3%，领先指数走高
items.summary_zh: 互联网计算机 (ICP) 较周四上涨 5.8%，也是表现最好的股票。

items.title: U.S. hiring slowdown could be great for bitcoin — unless wages spoil the party
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 8, 2026
items.title_zh: 美国招聘放缓可能对比特币有利——除非工资破坏了聚会
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 5 月 8 日天气预报

items.title: Bitcoin shows 2-cent price on Revolut as users report apparent BTC display glitch
items.summary: Screenshots showed BTC briefly far below global market prices, though it remains unclear whether any trades were executed at those levels or whether the move was a display issue.
items.title_zh: 由于用户报告明显的 BTC 显示故障，Revolut 上的比特币价格显示为 2 美分
items.summary_zh: 屏幕截图显示，比特币价格暂时远低于全球市场价格，但目前尚不清楚是否有任何交易是在这些水平上执行的，或者此举是否是显示问题。

items.title: TeraWulf’s $21 million HPC revenue surpasses bitcoin mining for first time in Q1
items.summary: Former pure-play bitcoin miners like TeraWulf are starting to report AI and HPC revenue overtaking their mining segments.
items.title_zh: TeraWulf 第一季度 HPC 收入 2100 万美元首次超过比特币挖矿
items.summary_zh: 像 TeraWulf 这样的前纯比特币矿工开始报告人工智能和高性能计算收入超过了他们的采矿部门。

items.title: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
items.summary: Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions.
items.title_zh: Parloa 建立客户想要交谈的服务代理
items.summary_zh: Parloa 利用 OpenAI 模型为可扩展、语音驱动的 AI 客户服务代理提供支持，使企业能够设计、模拟和部署可靠的实时交互。

items.title: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
items.summary: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
items.title_zh: 利用 API 中的新模型推进语音智能
items.summary_zh: 探索 OpenAI API 中新的实时语音模型，该模型可以推理、翻译和转录语音，从而实现更自然、更智能的语音体验。

items.title: How frontier firms are pulling ahead
items.summary: OpenAI’s B2B Signals research shows how frontier enterprises deepen AI adoption, scale Codex-powered agentic workflows, and build durable competitive advantage.
items.title_zh: 前沿企业如何领先

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT Futures: Class of 2026
items.summary: Meet the ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026—26 student innovators using AI to build, research, and drive real-world impact. Discover how this generation is redefining learning, creativity, and opportunity with ChatGPT.

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Uber and Disney are seeing the same remarkable dynamic in this economy. Both stocks are surging
items.summary: Uber and Disney pointed to a resilient spending backdrop, with consumers continuing to shell out for rides, food delivery, vacations and theme park trips.
items.title_zh: 优步和迪士尼在当前经济中也看到了同样显着的动态。两只股票都在飙升
items.summary_zh: 优步和迪士尼指出了消费背景的弹性，消费者继续为乘车、送餐、度假和主题公园旅行付费。

items.title: Intel and Micron are poised to break major milestones

items.summary_zh: 期权交易者无法获得足够的半导体股票。

items.title: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
items.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the US opts for a "reckless military adventure" every time a "diplomatic solution is on the table".
items.title_zh: 伊朗指责美国“鲁莽的军事冒险”
items.summary_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格奇表示，每次“外交解决方案摆在桌面上”时，美国都会选择“鲁莽的军事冒险”。

items.title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
items.summary: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.
items.title_zh: 全球竞相追踪受汉坦病毒袭击的游轮上的乘客
items.summary_zh: 迄今为止，约有 12 个国家与 MV Hondius 上的汉坦病毒爆发有关，联合国卫生机构已确认至少 5 例病例。

items.title: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
items.summary: The Constitutional Court says MPs were was wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.
items.title_zh: 法院裁决后南非总统面临辞职
items.summary_zh: 宪法法院表示，国会议员阻止针对西里尔·拉马福萨的弹劾程序是错误的。

items.title: Third British national has suspected hantavirus infection, UK government says
items.summary: The patient is on the remote Atlantic island of Tristan da Cunha, which was visited by the cruise ship in April.
items.title_zh: 英国政府称第三名英国国民疑似感染汉坦病毒
items.summary_zh: 该患者居住在偏远的大西洋岛屿特里斯坦达库尼亚岛，该游轮于四月份曾访问过该岛。

items.title: US jet fuel could be used in Europe to ease possible shortages
items.summary: An international air body suggests wider acceptance of US-grade jet fuel could help to head off any supply problems.
items.title_zh: 美国航空燃油可用于欧洲以缓解可能的短缺
items.summary_zh: 一个国际航空机构表示，更广泛地接受美国级航空燃油可能有助于避免任何供应问题。

items.title: The French Couple That Tried to Burgle 29 Churches in 3 Months
items.summary: A spree of thefts last summer heightened alarm in France over protection of cultural and rural heritage.

items.summary_zh: 去年夏天发生的一系列盗窃案加剧了法国对文化和乡村遗产保护的警觉。

items.title: South Africa’s President Faces Potential Impeachment After Court Decision
items.summary: Judges ordered Parliament to convene a committee to consider removing President Cyril Ramaphosa over a case involving money stolen from a couch at his farm six years ago.
items.title_zh: 法院判决后南非总统面临潜在弹劾
items.summary_zh: 法官命令议会召开一个委员会，考虑罢免总统西里尔·拉马福萨 (Cyril Ramaphosa)，原因是六年前他的农场沙发上的钱被盗。

items.title: Four Men Found Guilty of Haiti President’s Assassination
items.summary: President Jovenel Moïse, 53, was gunned down in his bedroom in July 2021. His killing unleashed a yearslong spiral of gang violence and mayhem in Haiti.
items.title_zh: 四名男子因刺杀海地总统而被判有罪
items.summary_zh: 53 岁的总统若弗内尔·莫伊兹于 2021 年 7 月在自己的卧室被枪杀。他的死引发了海地长达数年的帮派暴力和混乱。

items.title: Many Russians in No Mood for Celebration on Kremlin’s Biggest Day of the Year
items.summary: As the country heads into Victory Day, the economy is stalling, internet restrictions are growing and the Kremlin is fearing Ukrainian attacks.
items.title_zh: 许多俄罗斯人没有心情庆祝克里姆林宫一年中最重要的一天
items.summary_zh: 随着该国进入胜利日，经济陷入停滞，互联网限制不断增加，克里姆林宫担心乌克兰的袭击。

items.title: Two Men Are Convicted of Spying for China in Britain
items.summary: The men were arrested in 2024, accused of surveilling dissidents from Hong Kong in Britain. The case sent a chill through pro-democracy protesters who have fled the territory.
items.title_zh: 两名男子因在英国为中国从事间谍活动而被定罪
items.summary_zh: 这些人于 2024 年被捕，被指控在英国监视香港异见人士。这起案件让逃离香港的民主抗议者感到不寒而栗。

items.title: Stablecoin card spend is growing 100% year over year, Rain exec says
items.summary: Stablecoin settlement enables weekend/holiday settlement, reducing trapped capital by over 40%. This improves card economics and financial flexibility for issuers.
